items.title: Gauge rings rendering fix
items.change: Replaced hardcoded rgba(255,255,255,0.06) track color with CSS var --color-gauge-track for proper theme-aware rendering
items.assessment: Correct fix — uses design token instead of hardcoded value. Works in both dark and light themes.

items.title: Sparklines display fix
items.change: Replaced Math.random()-based generateMockTrend with seeded mulberry32 PRNG (generateStableTimeSeries). Added overflow:hidden container. Wrapped sparkline calls in useMemo with empty deps to prevent re-render shape changes.
items.assessment: High-quality fix — seeded PRNG ensures stable shapes, memoization prevents unnecessary recomputes, overflow:hidden prevents visual bleed. Minor note: useMemo with [] deps and ESLint suppression comment is a code smell, but functionally correct for the stated purpose.

items.title: Chart quality improvement
items.change: Added formatXAxis(), getTickInterval() for smart time-range-aware X-axis labels. Added CurrentValueBadge component. Added ReferenceLine import. Fixed tooltip timestamp formatting. Added --color-grid-line and --color-grid-line-subtle CSS vars for both dark and light themes.
items.assessment: Substantial improvement — smart tick intervals, themed grid lines, readable timestamps. CurrentValueBadge adds UX value. CSS vars properly handle both themes.

items.title: Code quality review
items.assessment: Dead code removed (38 lines from SparklineChart cleanup commit f555d7c). CSS vars properly namespaced. No unused imports. TypeScript types maintained. No backend changes — purely UI layer. E2E 97/115 (0 failures, 18 skipped — consistent with previous skips).

items.title: Regression risk assessment
items.assessment: All changes are visual-only, scoped to dashboard widgets and chart components. No API calls changed, no routing affected, no state management touched. E2E confirms 0 regressions. Seeded PRNG is deterministic — eliminates previous randomness-based hydration mismatches. Low regression risk.

summary: v193 delivers 3 targeted visual fixes to the dashboard: gauge ring tracks now use CSS design tokens (theme-aware), sparklines use a seeded PRNG for stable shapes across renders, and MetricsAreaChart gains smart time formatting, themed grid line variables, and a CurrentValueBadge. Code is clean — dead code removed, CSS vars properly scoped for dark/light themes. E2E PASS (97/115, 0 failures). Review score 10/10. All visual bugs confirmed fixed with correct implementation patterns. Score: 9.2/10 — minor deduction for useMemo([], []) ESLint suppression pattern.
